channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Cubs acquiring All-Star outfielder Kyle Tucker in trade with the Astros, AP source says
item.description: The Chicago Cubs are acquiring All-Star outfielder Kyle Tucker in a trade with the Houston Astros, paying a big price for one of baseball’s best hitters, a person familiar with the situation said.
item.dc:creator: Jay Cohen, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Poway 16-year-old starts nonprofit to deliver basketballs for the holidays
item.description: William Ralston's bedroom might look like an ordinary teenage boy's roo, but it is his very own Santa Claus-style workshop.
item.dc:creator: Frank Jefferson, Fox 5

item.title: Lindsey Vonn to enter World Cup ski races next weekend in Switzerland in her comeback at age 40
item.description: Lindsey Vonn will return to World Cup ski racing next weekend for a pair of super-G events in St. Moritz, Switzerland, as she continues her comeback at 40 years old.
item.dc:creator: Pat Graham, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Dick Vitale says he's cancer-free after 4 bouts with disease in just over 3 years
item.description: Vitale had surgery in the summer to remove cancerous lymph nodes from his neck. He was previously treated for melanoma and lymphoma, and had radiation treatments last year for vocal cord cancer.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: 49ers LB De'Vondre Campbell refuses to enter game after losing his starting spot
item.description: SANTA CLARA, Calif. (AP) — San Francisco linebacker De'Vondre Campbell refused to enter Thursday night's game in the third quarter after losing his starting job when Dre Greenlaw returned from an injury.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: 49ers' playoff hopes dealt critical blow with loss to Rams
item.description: SANTA CLARA, Calif. (KRON) -- The San Francisco 49ers' chances of making the playoffs are in serious peril after they lost 12-6 to the Los Angeles Rams on Thursday night. The 49ers (6-8) now sit 2.5 games behind the NFC West-leading Seattle Seahawks (8-5). The Rams improved to 8-6 with their win.
item.dc:creator: Phil Mayer, KRON4

item.title: US Olympic and Paralympic officials put coach on leave after AP reports sexual abuse allegations
item.description: The U.S. Olympic & Paralympic Committee has placed an employee on administrative leave after The Associated Press reported that one of its coaches was accused of sexually abusing a young biathlete, causing her so much distress that she attempted suicide.
item.dc:creator: Martha Bellisle, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Astros think Yankees have offered 'crap' for All-Star trade target: report
item.description: The New York Yankees and Houston Astros have been in trade talks about outfielder Kyle Tucker, but they remain far apart on an agreement, according to a report.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: NFL world reacts with excitement, surprise, questions after Bill Belichick is hired to coach UNC
item.description: Minutes after the University of North Carolina announced it had hired Bill Belichick as its next head football coach, the Tar Heels’ Instagram account posted a photo of the legendary NFL coach — at no more than 3 years old — sitting in the UNC bleachers.
item.dc:creator: KYLE HIGHTOWER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: American Jack Alexy wins first individual gold medal in men’s 100m free final at world swimming championships
item.description: Olympic gold medalist Jack Alexy took home his second gold medal and first individual gold at the short course World Championships on Thursday after winning the men's 100-meter freestyle.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Archie Manning walks back comments about wanting grandson Arch to play for the Cowboys
item.description: Archie Manning walked back his comments about wanting his grandson, Arch Manning, to play for the Dallas Cowboys once he finishes playing at Texas.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: FIFA confirms Saudi Arabia as 2034 World Cup host despite human rights concerns
item.description: ZURICH (AP) — Saudi Arabia was officially confirmed Wednesday by FIFA as host of the 2034 World Cup in men’s soccer, giving the oil-rich kingdom its biggest prize yet for massive spending on global sports driven by Crown Prince Mohammed bin Salman.
item.dc:creator: GRAHAM DUNBAR, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Bucs' defense prepares for Justin Herbert, Chargers offense
item.description: The Tampa Bay Buccaneer defense will face one of the best quarterbacks in the NFL on Sunday when the Los Angeles Chargers take the field.
item.dc:creator: Aileen Hnatiuk, WFLA, NBC

item.title: White Sox trade Garrett Crochet to Red Sox for prospect package
item.description: CHICAGO — The Chicago White Sox have traded ace starter Garrett Crochet to the Red Sox for a prospect package. The White Sox are getting back catcher Kyle Teel, who is the 25th ranked prospect in baseball by MLB.com.
item.dc:creator: Andy Koval, WGN 9

item.title: Column: The Bears are broken, and it wasn't the Hail Mary that broke them
item.description: Ryan Poles, the Chicago Bears' General Manager, is responsible for the team's player-execution problem, as the team has been outscored 63-13 in the first quarter this year and has a poor talent pool in key positions.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Silver Pigskin Finalist starts at Quarterback for Iowa Hawkeyes
item.description: Most walk-on players in college football never get the opportunity to take the field, especially not at quarterback, and certainly not for a Power Four football program like the Iowa Hawkeyes. But La Jolla alum Jackson Stratton has done just that.
item.dc:creator: Chase Izidoro, Fox 5

item.title: How to watch 'Monday Night Football' in 'The Simpsons' universe
item.description: The prime-time matchup between the Cincinnati Bengals and Dallas Cowboys will also take place at Springfield’s Atoms Stadium as part of “The Simpsons Funday Football” alternate broadcast.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Cubs announce 2025 coaching staff
item.description: CHICAGO — The Cubs announced its 2025 coaching staff Monday under the helm of second-year manager Craig Counsell. There are four new additions to his staff, including replacements for third base coach Willie Harris and first base coach Mike Napoli.
item.dc:creator: Andy Koval, WGN 9

item.title: Kyle Whittingham will return for 2025 season
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - It was a simple two word statement that made a resounding statement throughout the University of Utah athletic department. "I'm back." And with that, Utes head football coach Kyle Whittingham announced he will return to the program for his 21st season in 2025.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
